problem_title: Case summaries depend on manual drafting
problem_description: Compliance teams spend excessive time preparing internal case memos, slowing review cycles and creating inconsistencies. This manual process fragments workflow and weakens audit readiness for digital asset compliance operations.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY uses AI to draft structured internal case memos that connect provider outputs, reviewer notes, decision logs and evidence into one streamlined compliance workflow.
workflow_title: From provider checks to case summary
workflow_description: SFTY integrates provider outputs with AI-assisted review to generate structured case summaries that support consistent compliance decisions and audit evidence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams with a connected platform that connects provider outputs into structured workflows, AI-assisted reviews, case management, evidence preservation and reporting workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY automate case memo generation?
faq_2_answer: SFTY uses AI to draft internal case summaries, triage alerts and support compliance workflows, helping teams create consistent memos quickly while preserving reviewer oversight and decision control.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs, provider outputs and evidence packages to support audit-ready records are maintained for review and regulatory inspection readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting their outputs without disrupting current systems or requiring provider replacement.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a compliance control layer above providers, structuring their checks into workflows, decisions, and reports rather than replacing underlying compliance tools.
final_title: Draft structured compliance memos with SFTY
final_description: See how SFTY connects provider data into AI-assisted case summaries that support review and preserve audit-ready evidence.
